datasets.name: monitoring_alerts
queryLines:
SELECT
  metric_time,
  metric_name,
  metric_value,
  status,
  details
FROM
  btc_dev.monitoring.pipeline_metrics
WHERE
  status IN ('alert', 'warn')
  AND (
    CARDINALITY(:status_filter) = 0
    OR array_contains(:status_filter, status)
  )
  AND (
    CARDINALITY(:metric_name_filter) = 0
    OR array_contains(:metric_name_filter, metric_name)
  )
ORDER BY
  metric_time DESC
LIMIT 100

datasets.name: prediction_count
queryLines:
SELECT
  metric_time,
  metric_value AS prediction_count,
  status
FROM
  btc_dev.monitoring.pipeline_metrics
WHERE
  metric_name = 'prediction_count'
ORDER BY
  metric_time DESC
LIMIT 1

datasets.name: data_freshness
queryLines:
SELECT
  metric_time,
  metric_value AS raw_freshness_hours,
  status,
  details
FROM
  btc_dev.monitoring.pipeline_metrics
WHERE
  metric_name = 'raw_freshness_hours'
ORDER BY
  metric_time DESC
LIMIT 1

datasets.name: actual_vs_predicted
queryLines:
SELECT
  p.prediction_time,
  p.feature_open_time,
  p.predicted_close,
  r.open_time AS actual_open_time,
  r.close AS actual_close,
  ABS(r.close - p.predicted_close) AS abs_error,
  ABS(r.close - p.predicted_close) / ABS(r.close) AS pct_error
FROM
  btc_dev.predictions.btc_predictions p
    LEFT JOIN btc_dev.raw.btc_hourly r
      ON r.open_time = p.feature_open_time + INTERVAL 1 HOUR
WHERE
  p.prediction_time >= :date_range.min
  AND p.prediction_time <= :date_range.max
ORDER BY
  p.prediction_time DESC
LIMIT 100

datasets.name: features_count
queryLines:
SELECT
  metric_time,
  metric_value AS features_count,
  status
FROM
  btc_dev.monitoring.pipeline_metrics
WHERE
  metric_name = 'features_count'
ORDER BY
  metric_time DESC
LIMIT 1

datasets.name: metrics_timeline
queryLines:
SELECT
  metric_time,
  metric_name,
  metric_value,
  status,
  details
FROM
  btc_dev.monitoring.pipeline_metrics
WHERE
  (
    CARDINALITY(:status_filter) = 0
    OR array_contains(:status_filter, status)
  )
  AND (
    CARDINALITY(:metric_name_filter) = 0
    OR array_contains(:metric_name_filter, metric_name)
  )
ORDER BY
  metric_time DESC,
  metric_name
LIMIT 500

datasets.name: raw_data_count
queryLines:
SELECT
  metric_time,
  metric_value AS raw_count,
  status
FROM
  btc_dev.monitoring.pipeline_metrics
WHERE
  metric_name = 'raw_count'
ORDER BY
  metric_time DESC
LIMIT 1

datasets.name: latest_predictions
queryLines:
SELECT
  prediction_time,
  feature_open_time,
  predicted_close,
  model_uri
FROM
  btc_dev.predictions.btc_predictions
WHERE
  (
    CARDINALITY(:model_uri_filter) = 0
    OR array_contains(:model_uri_filter, model_uri)
  )
ORDER BY
  prediction_time DESC
LIMIT 50

datasets.name: prediction_error_trend
queryLines:
SELECT
  p.feature_open_time,
  p.predicted_close,
  r.close AS actual_close,
  ABS(r.close - p.predicted_close) AS abs_error,
  ABS(r.close - p.predicted_close) / ABS(r.close) AS pct_error
FROM
  btc_dev.predictions.btc_predictions p
    JOIN btc_dev.raw.btc_hourly r
      ON r.open_time = p.feature_open_time + INTERVAL 1 HOUR
WHERE
  p.feature_open_time >= :date_range.min
  AND p.feature_open_time <= :date_range.max
ORDER BY
  p.feature_open_time

datasets.name: error_stats
queryLines:
SELECT
  AVG(abs_error) AS avg_abs_error,
  AVG(pct_error) AS avg_pct_error,
  MAX(abs_error) AS max_abs_error,
  MAX(pct_error) AS max_pct_error,
  MIN(abs_error) AS min_abs_error,
  MIN(pct_error) AS min_pct_error,
  COUNT(*) AS total_predictions
FROM
  (
    SELECT
      ABS(r.close - p.predicted_close) AS abs_error,
      ABS(r.close - p.predicted_close) / ABS(r.close) AS pct_error
    FROM
      btc_dev.predictions.btc_predictions p
        JOIN btc_dev.raw.btc_hourly r
          ON r.open_time = p.feature_open_time + INTERVAL 1 HOUR
    WHERE
      p.feature_open_time >= :date_range.min
      AND p.feature_open_time <= :date_range.max

datasets.name: prediction_data_quality
queryLines:
SELECT
  COUNT(*) AS total_predictions,
  COUNT(predicted_close) AS predicted_close_count,
  COUNT(model_uri) AS model_uri_count,
  (COUNT(predicted_close) * 100.0 / COUNT(*)) AS predicted_completeness_pct,
  (COUNT(model_uri) * 100.0 / COUNT(*)) AS model_uri_completeness_pct
FROM
  btc_predictions

datasets.name: outlier_detection
queryLines:
WITH stats AS (
  SELECT
    PERCENTILE(close, 0.25) AS q1,
    PERCENTILE(close, 0.75) AS q3,
    PERCENTILE(close, 0.75) - PERCENTILE(close, 0.25) AS iqr
  FROM
    btc_hourly
)
SELECT
  open_time,
  close,
  CASE
    WHEN
      close < (q1 - 1.5 * iqr)
      OR close > (q3 + 1.5 * iqr)
    THEN
      'Outlier'
    ELSE 'Normal'
  END AS outlier_status
FROM
  btc_hourly,
  stats
WHERE
  open_time >= :date_range.min
  AND open_time <= :date_range.max
  AND (
    close < (q1 - 1.5 * iqr)
    OR close > (q3 + 1.5 * iqr)
  )
ORDER BY
  open_time DESC
LIMIT 100

datasets.name: data_volume_trend
queryLines:
SELECT
  DATE_TRUNC('day', open_time) AS date,
  COUNT(*) AS record_count
FROM
  btc_hourly
WHERE
  open_time >= :date_range.min
  AND open_time <= :date_range.max
GROUP BY
  DATE_TRUNC('day', open_time)
ORDER BY
  date

datasets.name: data_quality_score
queryLines:
WITH completeness AS (
  SELECT
    (COUNT(open) + COUNT(high) + COUNT(low) + COUNT(close) + COUNT(volume))
      * 100.0
      / (COUNT(*) * 5) AS completeness_score
  FROM
    btc_hourly
)
SELECT
  ROUND(completeness_score, 2) AS quality_score
FROM
  completeness

datasets.name: missing_values
queryLines:
SELECT
  'open' AS field_name,
  COUNT(*) - COUNT(open) AS missing_count,
  COUNT(*) AS total_count
FROM
  btc_hourly
UNION ALL
SELECT
  'high' AS field_name,
  COUNT(*) - COUNT(high) AS missing_count,
  COUNT(*) AS total_count
FROM
  btc_hourly
UNION ALL
SELECT
  'low' AS field_name,
  COUNT(*) - COUNT(low) AS missing_count,
  COUNT(*) AS total_count
FROM
  btc_hourly
UNION ALL
SELECT
  'close' AS field_name,
  COUNT(*) - COUNT(close) AS missing_count,
  COUNT(*) AS total_count
FROM
  btc_hourly
UNION ALL
SELECT
  'volume' AS field_name,
  COUNT(*) - COUNT(volume) AS missing_count,
  COUNT(*) AS total_count
FROM
  btc_hourly

datasets.name: data_completeness
queryLines:
SELECT
  COUNT(*) AS total_records,
  COUNT(open) AS open_count,
  COUNT(high) AS high_count,
  COUNT(low) AS low_count,
  COUNT(close) AS close_count,
  COUNT(volume) AS volume_count,
  (COUNT(open) * 100.0 / COUNT(*)) AS open_completeness_pct,
  (COUNT(high) * 100.0 / COUNT(*)) AS high_completeness_pct,
  (COUNT(low) * 100.0 / COUNT(*)) AS low_completeness_pct,
  (COUNT(close) * 100.0 / COUNT(*)) AS close_completeness_pct,
  (COUNT(volume) * 100.0 / COUNT(*)) AS volume_completeness_pct
FROM
  btc_hourly

datasets.name: time_gaps
queryLines:
WITH time_diffs AS (
  SELECT
    open_time,
    LEAD(open_time) OVER (ORDER BY open_time) AS next_time,
    TIMESTAMPDIFF(HOUR, open_time, LEAD(open_time) OVER (ORDER BY open_time)) AS hours_gap
  FROM
    btc_hourly
  WHERE
    open_time >= :date_range.min
    AND open_time <= :date_range.max
)
SELECT
  open_time,
  next_time,
  hours_gap
FROM
  time_diffs
WHERE
  hours_gap > 1
ORDER BY
  hours_gap DESC
LIMIT 100

datasets.name: price_validation
queryLines:
SELECT
  COUNT(*) AS total_records,
  SUM(
    CASE
      WHEN open <= 0 THEN 1
      ELSE 0
    END
  ) AS invalid_open,
  SUM(
    CASE
      WHEN high <= 0 THEN 1
      ELSE 0
    END
  ) AS invalid_high,
  SUM(
    CASE
      WHEN low <= 0 THEN 1
      ELSE 0
    END
  ) AS invalid_low,
  SUM(
    CASE
      WHEN close <= 0 THEN 1
      ELSE 0
    END
  ) AS invalid_close,
  SUM(
    CASE
      WHEN volume < 0 THEN 1
      ELSE 0
    END
  ) AS invalid_volume,
  (
    SUM(
      CASE
        WHEN
          open > 0
          AND high > 0
          AND low > 0
          AND close > 0
          AND volume >= 0
        THEN
          1
        ELSE 0
      END
    )
      * 100.0
      / COUNT(*)
  ) AS valid_price_pct
FROM
  btc_hourly
WHERE
  open_time >= :date_range.min
  AND open_time <= :date_range.max

datasets.name: duplicate_records
queryLines:
SELECT
  open_time,
  COUNT(*) AS duplicate_count
FROM
  btc_hourly
WHERE
  open_time >= :date_range.min
  AND open_time <= :date_range.max
GROUP BY
  open_time
HAVING
  COUNT(*) > 1
ORDER BY
  duplicate_count DESC
LIMIT 100

datasets.name: data_consistency
queryLines:
SELECT
  COUNT(*) AS total_records,
  SUM(
    CASE
      WHEN high < low THEN 1
      ELSE 0
    END
  ) AS high_low_violations,
  SUM(
    CASE
      WHEN high < close THEN 1
      ELSE 0
    END
  ) AS high_close_violations,
  SUM(
    CASE
      WHEN low > close THEN 1
      ELSE 0
    END
  ) AS low_close_violations,
  SUM(
    CASE
      WHEN high < open THEN 1
      ELSE 0
    END
  ) AS high_open_violations,
  SUM(
    CASE
      WHEN low > open THEN 1
      ELSE 0
    END
  ) AS low_open_violations,
  (
    SUM(
      CASE
        WHEN
          high >= low
          AND high >= close
          AND low <= close
          AND high >= open
          AND low <= open
        THEN
          1
        ELSE 0
      END
    )
      * 100.0
      / COUNT(*)
  ) AS consistency_score
FROM
  btc_hourly
WHERE
  open_time >= :date_range.min
  AND open_time <= :date_range.max

datasets.name: null_rate_trend
queryLines:
SELECT
  DATE_TRUNC('day', open_time) AS date,
  COUNT(*) AS total_records,
  (COUNT(*) - COUNT(open)) * 100.0 / COUNT(*) AS open_null_pct,
  (COUNT(*) - COUNT(high)) * 100.0 / COUNT(*) AS high_null_pct,
  (COUNT(*) - COUNT(low)) * 100.0 / COUNT(*) AS low_null_pct,
  (COUNT(*) - COUNT(close)) * 100.0 / COUNT(*) AS close_null_pct,
  (COUNT(*) - COUNT(volume)) * 100.0 / COUNT(*) AS volume_null_pct
FROM
  btc_hourly
WHERE
  open_time >= :date_range.min
  AND open_time <= :date_range.max
GROUP BY
  DATE_TRUNC('day', open_time)
ORDER BY
  date

datasets.name: prediction_latency
queryLines:
SELECT
  prediction_time,
  feature_open_time,
  TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, feature_open_time, prediction_time) AS latency_minutes
FROM
  btc_predictions
WHERE
  prediction_time >= :date_range.min
  AND prediction_time <= :date_range.max
ORDER BY
  prediction_time DESC
LIMIT 100

datasets.name: r_squared_metric
queryLines:
WITH predictions AS (
  SELECT
    r.close AS actual,
    p.predicted_close AS predicted
  FROM
    btc_dev.predictions.btc_predictions p
      JOIN btc_dev.raw.btc_hourly r
        ON r.open_time = p.feature_open_time + INTERVAL 1 HOUR
  WHERE
    p.feature_open_time >= :date_range.min
    AND p.feature_open_time <= :date_range.max
),
stats AS (
  SELECT
    AVG(actual) AS mean_actual,
    SUM(POWER(actual - predicted, 2)) AS ss_res,
    SUM(
      POWER(
        actual
          - (
            SELECT
              AVG(actual)
            FROM
              predictions
          ),
        2
      )
    ) AS ss_tot
  FROM
    predictions
)
SELECT
  1 - (ss_res / NULLIF(ss_tot, 0)) AS r_squared
FROM
  stats

datasets.name: latest_training_run
queryLines:
SELECT
  run_id,
  run_timestamp,
  model_type,
  training_time_seconds,
  n_trials,
  n_early_stopped,
  rmse,
  mae,
  mape,
  r_squared
FROM
  btc_dev.monitoring.model_training_runs
ORDER BY
  run_timestamp DESC
LIMIT 1

datasets.name: rmse_metric
queryLines:
SELECT
  SQRT(AVG(POWER(r.close - p.predicted_close, 2))) AS rmse
FROM
  btc_dev.predictions.btc_predictions p
    JOIN btc_dev.raw.btc_hourly r
      ON r.open_time = p.feature_open_time + INTERVAL 1 HOUR
WHERE
  p.feature_open_time >= :date_range.min
  AND p.feature_open_time <= :date_range.max

datasets.name: training_runs_history
queryLines:
SELECT
  run_timestamp,
  model_type,
  training_time_seconds,
  n_trials,
  n_early_stopped,
  rmse,
  mae,
  mape,
  r_squared,
  best_trial_number
FROM
  btc_dev.monitoring.model_training_runs
ORDER BY
  run_timestamp DESC
LIMIT 10

datasets.name: drift_metrics_latest
queryLines:
SELECT
  metric_time,
  metric_name,
  metric_value,
  status,
  details
FROM
  btc_dev.monitoring.pipeline_metrics
WHERE
  metric_name RLIKE '^(data_drift|label_drift|prediction_drift|model_drift|concept_drift|feature_quality|schema_drift)_'
ORDER BY
  metric_time DESC,
  metric_name
LIMIT 300

datasets.name: drift_alerts_warnings
queryLines:
SELECT
  metric_time,
  metric_name,
  metric_value,
  status,
  details
FROM
  btc_dev.monitoring.pipeline_metrics
WHERE
  metric_name RLIKE '^(data_drift|label_drift|prediction_drift|model_drift|concept_drift|feature_quality|schema_drift)_'
  AND status IN ('alert', 'warn')
ORDER BY
  metric_time DESC,
  metric_name
LIMIT 100

datasets.name: drift_performance_trend
queryLines:
SELECT
  metric_time,
  metric_name,
  metric_value,
  status
FROM
  btc_dev.monitoring.pipeline_metrics
WHERE
  metric_name IN (
    'model_drift_rmse_24h',
    'model_drift_mae_24h',
    'model_drift_mape_24h',
    'model_drift_direction_accuracy_24h',
    'model_drift_p95_abs_error_24h',
    'concept_drift_mean_error_bias_24h'
  )
ORDER BY
  metric_time DESC,
  metric_name
LIMIT 300

datasets.name: job_quality_metrics
queryLines:
SELECT
  metric_time,
  metric_name,
  metric_value,
  status,
  details
FROM
  btc_dev.monitoring.pipeline_metrics
WHERE
  metric_name RLIKE '^job_quality_'
ORDER BY
  metric_time DESC,
  metric_name
LIMIT 300

datasets.name: job_quality_alerts_warnings
queryLines:
SELECT
  metric_time,
  metric_name,
  metric_value,
  status,
  details
FROM
  btc_dev.monitoring.pipeline_metrics
WHERE
  metric_name RLIKE '^job_quality_'
  AND status IN ('alert', 'warn')
ORDER BY
  metric_time DESC,
  metric_name
LIMIT 100

frame.title: Model and Concept Drift Performance Metrics
